历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Science/Physics Category were approximately 4901 → 5245 → 8644 → 8651 → 8585. Rankings were in the 4900–5200 range in 2021–2022, dropped significantly to 8644 in 2023, and stabilized around 8585–8651 in 2024–2025. In the past 3 years, rankings fluctuated narrowly between 8500 and 8700, with a baseline ranking of about 8585 in 2025. The university's planned enrollment for Science/Physics Category in Guizhou: 6 in 2021, 6 in 2022, 5 in 2023, 7 in 2024, 4 in 2025. In 2026, the plan expands significantly to 11, an increase of 7 (+175%) from 2025, greatly easing competition and allowing rankings to shift backward substantially.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shanghai International Studies University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. Its Soft Science Chinese University Ranking is approximately 81st in 2026, with a continuous upward trend in recent years, steadily improving overall strength and brand recognition. The reputation evaluation for 2026 is neutral/mixed. It ranks 49th in Douyin popularity (relatively hot), with moderate to high exposure on short video platforms. No significant admission gaps or abnormal admission records have been observed. Foreign Language and Literature is an A+ discipline (top in the country). Majors in Physics Category such as Management Science and Engineering, Journalism and Communication, and Translation are all related to language/management disciplines, with disciplinary advantages attracting candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors like Management Science and Engineering and Journalism and Communication have diverging social popularity (Journalism and Communication saw a notable discouragement trend in 2023, while Management remains stable). The estimated number of Physics Category candidates in Guizhou in 2026 is about 208,403, based on a recent proportion of approximately 69.7%, a slight increase of 0.59% from 207,171 in 2025, keeping the competition base basically stable. Shanghai International Studies University is located in Shanghai, a first-tier city with strong regional appeal to candidates from southwestern regions. The university's enrollment proportion in Guizhou's Physics Category is relatively small, but it will increase significantly after expansion.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 8585, the 2026 plan's massive 175% expansion, the basically stable number of candidates in the province, and the continuous rise in Soft Science rankings, the expansion's effect on shifting rankings backward is most critical. The predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 17099, with a range of 16599–17599.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Translation (Multiple Directions) (including Translation, Translation (Business Administration Dual Degree), Translation (Language Intelligence))
- Law.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Management Science and Engineering (Outstanding Management Talent Program) (including Information Management and Information Systems, Big Data Management and Application)
- Business Administration (Outstanding Management Talent Program) (including Business Administration, Marketing, Financial Management, Public Relations).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Journalism and Communication (Outstanding International Journalism and Communication Talent Program) (including Journalism, Radio and Television, Advertising, Network and New Media, International Journalism and Communication)
- International Economics and Trade (Japanese).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, the Physics Category expands significantly to 11 students, with rankings expected to shift backward to approximately 17099, range 16599–17599. Candidates with rankings at the lower end of the range (16599) can aim for Tier 1 Translation or Law majors; those in the middle of the range (around 17099) are advised to focus on Tier 2 Management Science and Engineering or Business Administration; those near the upper end (17599) can consider Tier 3 Journalism and Communication or International Economics and Trade as safety options.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category were approximately 604 → 689 → 1550 → 1289 → 1448. Rankings were better in 2021–2022 (600–700), significantly dropped to 1550 in 2023, recovered to 1289 in 2024, and dropped again to 1448 in 2025. The fluctuation range in the past 3 years is about 1200–1550, with a baseline ranking of about 1448 in 2025. The planned enrollment for this university in Guizhou Province's liberal arts/history category: 5 in 2021, 5 in 2022, 4 in 2023, 3 in 2024, 4 in 2025. In 2026, the plan significantly expands to 10, an increase of 6 (+150%) compared to 2025. The expansion is substantial, competition pressure is significantly alleviated, and there is considerable room for ranking to drop.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shanghai International Studies University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Ranking, it is approximately 81st, with rankings continuously rising in recent years (93 in 2021 → 95 in 2022 → 97 in 2023 → 96 in 2024 → 82 in 2025 → 81 in 2026). The university's comprehensive strength and recognition are steadily improving. The 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed (management incidents such as air conditioning fee disputes). In 2022, there were somewhat negative incidents related to teacher ethics, but these have stabilized in recent years. Douyin popularity ranking is 49th (relatively hot), with medium-to-high exposure on short video platforms, and no obvious negative public opinion impact. Foreign Language and Literature is an A+ discipline (top in the country), highly consistent with the university's language-oriented characteristics. Majors in the enrollment plan such as Translation, Business English, and International Economics and Trade (Japanese) are closely related to the first-level discipline of Foreign Language and Literature, and the disciplinary advantage strongly attracts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, the popularity of foreign language majors was assessed as 'generally wait-and-see', with overall social popularity of language majors being stable but relatively cool. In 2026, the total number of candidates in this province is about 299,000. Based on the recent history category proportion of about 30.3%, it is estimated to be about 90,597, a slight increase of 0.57% from 90,087 in 2025, so the competition base is basically stable. Shanghai International Studies University is located in Shanghai, a first-tier city, which has strong regional appeal to candidates from the southwest region. The university's enrollment proportion in Guizhou Province is about 1.8% (2021), not a major source province, but after expansion, the proportion will significantly increase.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 1448, the significant 150% enrollment expansion in 2026, the basically stable number of candidates in the province, the continuously rising Soft Science ranking of the university, and the stable but cool popularity of foreign language majors, the expansion's effect on lowering the ranking is most critical, but the university's level and disciplinary advantages provide some support for the ranking. The predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is about 2476, with a range of 2030–2922.
